title: CC Shops
body:
This mod adds integration between **ComputerCraft** and **Simple Shops** to let computers have more access to the Shops in various ways

The list of features include:
- Simple Shop Peripheral *(lets you get information on the shops, including events)*
- Simple Shop Command Peripheral *(lets Command Computers both get and set shop information)*
- Turtles gain the ability to buy from Shops via ShopAPI
- An event is fired upon any attempt to buy, *whether by turtle or player!*


I was inspired to make this addon after realizing that, besides visual indicators, there was no way to get information from these shops, not even Comparator output!

This mod is under the **MIT License** and can be used freely in any modpack!
